global.site_tagline: Solar EPC • EnergyCare AMC • Storage • EV Charging • PowerStore
global.header_callout: Jharkhand-based solar, service and energy growth partner for homes, businesses and institutions

hero.title: Dakshayani EnergyCare for 25 years of reliable solar performance
hero.subtitle: We install, maintain, monitor and upgrade solar systems for homes, businesses, institutions and government projects across Jharkhand and Eastern India.
hero.primary_caption: Solar EPC execution backed by service, documentation and long-term support.
hero.announcement_text: PM Surya Ghar, commercial solar, AMC, hybrid backup, EV charging and solar material support under one brand.

sections.what_our_customers_say_title: Trusted by households, institutions and project clients
sections.what_our_customers_say_subtitle: Dakshayani Enterprises is building a long-term energy service network around installation quality, documentation support and after-sales care.
sections.seasonal_offer_text: Book solar health checks, AMC packages, PM Surya Ghar support, hybrid backup planning and commercial solar consultations.
sections.cta_strip_title: Ready to build 25 years of solar savings?
sections.cta_strip_text: Share your electricity bill, site photos or existing solar issue and our team will guide you with the next practical step.

testimonials.name: Residential Solar Customer
testimonials.message: Dakshayani handled solar installation, paperwork and follow-up in a practical way. The team remained reachable after installation.

testimonials.name: Institutional Project Client
testimonials.message: The team understands EPC execution, documentation and site coordination, which is important for institutional and government-style projects.

seasonal_offers.label: Solar Health Check
seasonal_offers.description: Inspection of generation, inverter status, wiring, earthing and visible system issues for existing rooftop solar owners.

seasonal_offers.label: Commercial Solar Planning Desk
seasonal_offers.description: Bill analysis, load study and savings direction for schools, petrol pumps, offices, hospitals and MSMEs.

seasonal_offers.label: Installer & Material Partner Intake
seasonal_offers.description: Apply for installer network, solar material support, PowerStore sourcing and district-level partnership discussions.
